title: Our Love Story
content:
We first met in church in 2015, never knowing that God was already writing our story. What started as a simple friendship — treating each other like kuya and little sister — slowly grew into a bond built on shared faith, service, and genuine care for one another.

As the years passed, life brought us through different seasons — focusing on work, serving in different places, and even distance when one of us worked overseas. Yet through it all, God faithfully led our paths back to each other. In His perfect timing, He allowed us to see each other in a new light, turning friendship into love.

With prayerful hearts, courtship began. Even distance could not stop what God was growing between us. One sweet "yes" across the miles marked the start of our relationship, and soon after, God blessed us with the chance to be together again — no longer separated by distance, but walking side by side.

Then came a beautiful proposal filled with love, prayers, and happy tears — a moment that led us here.

Today, we stand grateful for how God has written our story. With Him at the center, we begin our forever — trusting in His plans, His timing, and His unfailing love for us.

"I found him whom my soul loveth" – Song of Solomon 3:4
